headline: Brown-Forman Attracts Multiple Suitors And Renews Questions On Future Direction
summary: Sazerac has approached Brown-Forman (NYSE:BF.B) about a potential acquisition. This interest comes on top of recent merger discussions between Brown-Forman and Pernod Ricard. Multiple large spirits groups are now exploring deals involving Brown-Forman, pointing to active M&A interest. Brown-Forman, known for its global spirits portfolio, is now at the center of possible consolidation in the sector as both Sazerac and Pernod Ricard explore deals involving the company. For you as an investor,...
